hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.js) node --check "$f" 2>&1 || echo "SYNTAX_WARN: $f";; esac
f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.js|*.html) grep -nE 'console\.log|TODO|FIXME' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true;; esac

f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in public/*.html) if grep -nE '>[A-Z][a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z ,.!?]{4,}<' "$f" | grep -v 'data-copy-key\|<script\|<style\|<!--' | head -5 | grep .; then echo 'COPY_WARN: possible hardcoded user-facing copy in HTML — all strings should come from config.copy.* via the API payload'; fi;; esac

f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *server.js) grep -nE "\\$\\{[^}]*req\\." "$f" && echo 'SECURITY_WARN: possible SQL injection via template literal touching req.* — use sqlParam() + parameterized queries' || true;; esac
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && node --check server.js 2>&1 && echo 'server.js: syntax OK' || echo 'STOP_WARN: server.js has syntax errors'
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && (npm test --silent 2>&1 | tail -20) || echo 'TEST_STOP_WARN: npm test failed or not configured'

if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|rm -rf \*|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE TABLE'; then echo 'DANGEROUS_COMMAND_BLOCKED: rm -rf on root/glob, DROP/TRUNCATE TABLE. Get explicit user approval first.'; exit 1; fi
